name: Pumpkin Cake #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the eggs and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the remaining ingredients one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Pour the batter into a greased bundt or tube pan.
4. Bake in an oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
5. Remove from the oven when done and let cool before serving.
